idea.title: GenPlatform.ai — Mission Control for AI Development
idea.originalIdea: بناء منصة متكاملة للتحكم في وكلاء الذكاء الاصطناعي وأتمتة تطوير المشاريع. المنصة تحول الأفكار إلى مشاريع احترافية عبر pipeline ذكي يشمل التحليل، التخطيط، التطوير، المراجعة، والنشر.
idea.problemSolved: لا توجد أداة متكاملة تجمع بين إدارة المشاريع + تنفيذ AI agents + تتبع التقدم في مكان واحد
idea.valueProposition: من فكرة بسيطة إلى مشروع منشور — كل شيء في مكان واحد بدعم كامل من الذكاء الاصطناعي

coreFeatures.name: Pipeline Visualization
coreFeatures.description: 7-stage interactive pipeline from Idea to Deploy

coreFeatures.name: AI Chat Execution
coreFeatures.description: Chat that reads code, proposes fixes, and executes them

coreFeatures.name: Self-Improvement Agent
coreFeatures.description: Daily agent that analyzes and suggests improvements

coreFeatures.name: Ideas Intelligence
coreFeatures.description: AI transforms vague ideas into detailed project plans

coreFeatures.name: Multi-Account Claude
coreFeatures.description: Rotate between 2 Claude Pro Max accounts for uninterrupted work

coreFeatures.name: File Manager
coreFeatures.description: Browse and view project files directly in the dashboard

coreFeatures.name: Subdomain Auto-Deploy
coreFeatures.description: Each project gets its own .gen3.ai subdomain automatically

techStack.ai: Claude Opus 4 via OpenClaw + OAuth rotation

planning.architecture:
Frontend (Next.js:3000) ← Caddy SSL → User
Bridge API (Express:3001) ← Frontend → OpenClaw → Claude
OpenClaw ← Telegram Bot → User

pages.name: Dashboard
pages.role: System overview with live stats and agent status

pages.name: Projects
pages.role: List all projects with pipeline status

pages.name: Project Detail
pages.role: Full pipeline + files + chat per project

pages.name: Chat
pages.role: Claude Code — AI engineer with server access

pages.name: Ideas
pages.role: AI-powered idea analysis and conversion to projects

pages.name: Agents
pages.role: Active AI agents and their tasks

keyDecisions: JSON files for storage (no DB setup needed)
OpenClaw as Claude interface (OAuth not API key)
Bridge API as execution layer (server commands)
